title: About
text:
I’m a mathematician specializing in the modeling of complex systems. My expertise lies in dynamical systems, stochastic processes, and numerical analysis, with applications in the biosciences and bioinformatics.
With proficiency in Julia, Python, and R, I develop and implement analytical and numerical solutions to challenging problems.
I’m particularly fascinated by genetics and the application of mathematical theory to biological emergence — an interest that grows out of a long-standing passion for genetics and its relationship to developmental biology.
